Affected Text: Go to Inventory and click "Add Item." Fill in the title, description, price, condition, and upload your photos. Once the item is saved, click "Cross-List" and select the marketplaces you want to publish to. VaultLister will map your data to each platform's required format and submit the listings. You can optionally customize fields per marketplace — for example, setting a different price on Depop than on eBay — before publishing. The cross-listing panel shows the publish status for each platform...

Affected Text: If a listing fails to publish on one platform, VaultLister records the error and shows it in the item's listing status panel. Common reasons include missing required fields (e.g., eBay item specifics), an expired OAuth token, or a platform-side API outage. VaultLister will not silently mark the listing as active if publishing failed — the status will show "Failed" with the error reason.
